name: io.github.satelliteoflove/godot-mcp
title: Godot MCP
description: Agent-driven Godot playtesting: editor control, input injection, game-time stepping, live state.

environmentVariables.name: GODOT_HOST
environmentVariables.description: Override the host used to reach the Godot editor bridge (e.g. for WSL2 or remote setups). Auto-detected when unset.

environmentVariables.name: GODOT_MCP_READ_ONLY
environmentVariables.description: Set to 1 (or true) to register only read-only observation tools: no scene/node/animation edits, no game control, no input injection. Same as the --read-only flag.
